text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer believes that racing in the Twinkle
Series shouldn't be all about pressure. She thinks
she should place more emphasis on having fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to run in freestyle races again, where
she doesn't have to worry about constraints or
responsibilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she finds that running off-grid isn't
satisfying enough. They're still heated and fun,
but there isn't enough pressure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to go back to competing against
Mejiro Ryan and Mejiro McQueen. She wants the
pride that comes from beating them in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having realized where she belongs, Mejiro Palmer
returns to the Twinkle Series.
